summary: Comprehensive SSR + UI testing of CRO uplift batch (hero/mockup, trust strip, cost block, flow timeline, stub pages, reordered pricing, demo scenario picker with auto-play, shorter contact form, mobile sticky CTA, about how-block, SEO). 39/39 pytest tests passed. Playwright verified demo auto-play (4 bubbles in 5s), scenario switch (clinic -> new chat), mobile-sticky behaviour (present on home, removed on contact), inline lead form, FAQ accordion, and contact form submission. Zero console errors. /api/lead endpoint preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 252: pricing priceCurrency falls back to USD for RU — for RU market typically RUB would be expected (low priority, not in scope of this uplift)
server.py lines 316/488/518 pre-existing lint warnings (F841/F541/E741) acknowledged by main agent — not addressed

NEXTBOT_REF_URL shows placeholder 'https://t.me/your_bot' in Telegram CTA in preview env (mobile sticky, contact page) — this is env-driven, expected for preview but must be updated in production .env
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 TEST_ lead via /api/lead and 1 via contact form submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_cro_uplift.py covers all CRO uplift requirements (hero, trust strip, cost block, flow, industries, stub/detail solution pages, pricing order + self-serve + FAQ, demo scenario picker, contact form, mobile sticky, about how-block, inline lead form, SEO titles/canonical/hreflang, footer copy, /api/lead). Playwright covered JS-only flows (demo auto-play, scenario switch, FAQ toggle, contact submit, mobile-sticky contact removal). No issues to retest.
